title: Double Jump
description: Add the ability to Double Jump in the game!
body:
# Double Jump
Add the ability to Double Jump in the game!

## How to use
You can Double Jump by pressing `SPACE` on your keyboard after jumping normally. This will create particles when you Double Jump and when you land and will negate fall damage. You can only Double Jump twice.

### Support
If you need support, want the mod for another version of the game or want custom features like Double Jump only available in spawn or permission-based, DM me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/zk5at7q6zQ).
